title: Kanmani Anbudan
description: Anbu and his family are stranded in a forest at night, where a police officer arranges their stay. Anbu then gathers the courage to open his heart to Kanmani.

title: Thendrale Mella Pesu
description: Ganthimathi and Kumaresan accept Ilamathi after learning of her risky attempt to expose Kalamma as Ashok's killer. Meanwhile, Paraman finds out that Kalamma fakes drinking poison.

title: Suttum Vizhi Sudare
description: Abinaya and Divya share a refreshing moment that strengthens their growing friendship bond. Vetri confirms with Pulikkutti that Abinaya is innocent in Parvathy's death.

title: Pandian Stores 2
description: Kathir takes Muthuvel to the hospital, where Pandian reveals that Muthuvel has cancer. The family rushes over, leaving Raji and Gomathi completely devastated.

title: Ayyanar Thunai
episodeTitle: A Sweet Moment for Chozhan and Nila
description: While cooking together, Chozhan and Nila share a playful romantic moment. Elsewhere, Chandayatha tearfully reveals to Cheran that her parents force her to marry her uncle.

title: Siragadikka Aasai
description: Rohini breaks into tears when Manoj claims he has arranged the money and insists she sign the divorce papers. Meanwhile, Vijaya plans a celebration for Manoj's divorce from Rohini.

title: Super Singer Junior
description: A grand tribute to K. Bhagyaraj unfolds with special guest Livingston. Soulful performances celebrating S. Janaki's timeless melodies leave the audience spellbound.

title: Cooku With Comali
description: Contestants grab their partners for a fierce seafood battle. Soon, the kitchen heats up as contestants race against time in a potato task taught by the chef.
